channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: US lifts maritime blockade on Iranian ports after peace deal
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- US says it lifted blockade on Iranian ports
- US confirms lifting of the blockade of Iranian ports after peace deal kicks in
- Under peace deal, US forces lift blockade on all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports
- US military says it has lifted naval blockade of Iranian ports
- US lifts blockade of Iran and Iranian supreme leader endorses direct talks with American officials
- US lifts naval blockade on Iranian ports under interim deal: Vance
- 'All US blockade enforcement efforts have ceased': Centcom lifts blockade on ships to, from Iranian ports
- US lifts blockade on Iranian ports, Vance says more than a dozen ships passed
- US lifts naval blockade on Iran — CENTCOM
- US effectively lifts blockade of Iran's seaports — Vance]]>

item.title: Hegseth renews Nato criticism and says US will review presence in Europe
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Hegseth blasts NATO allies, says US will review forces in Europe
- Hegseth warns NATO allies, launches major European review
- Hegseth Berates NATO Allies for ‘Shameful’ Response to U.S. War in Iran
- Hegseth Announces Review of U.S. Forces in Europe, Threatens NATO Cuts
- Hegseth blasts NATO allies, says U.S. will review forces in Europe
- Hegseth announces review of US forces in Europe, rips NATO allies
- Hegseth Announces Review of U.S. Troops in Europe and Scolds NATO Allies Over ‘Shameful’ Response to Iran War
- Hegseth Tells NATO US Will Review Force Presence In Europe
- Hegseth slams NATO allies during roundtable meeting
- Hegseth blasts Nato for not giving US access to European bases during Iran war
- Hegseth unveils six-month review of US military presence in Europe
- Hegseth Berates NATO Allies for ‘Shameful’ Response to U.S. War in Iran
- Hegseth Orders Review of US Force Posture in Europe, Warns NATO Laggards of Consequences
- Hegseth announces review of US troop deployment in Europe
- Hegseth blasts NATO members, announces review of US forces in Europe
- Hegseth tells NATO US will review force presence in Europe
- Hegseth announces review of US troops in Europe, scorns some allies]]>

item.title: Ukraine strikes Moscow refinery, disrupts air travel in major drone offensive
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Ukraine hits Moscow with its biggest drone strike yet
- Ukraine pummels Russian capital with what may be largest drone strike yet on Moscow
- Ukraine Hits Moscow Oil Refinery And Disrupts Commercial Flights With Major Drone Attack
- Ukraine hits Moscow refinery in major drone attack on Russian capital
- Ukraine’s second drone strike in two days knocks Moscow’s main oil refinery completely offline
- Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
- What did Ukraine target in Moscow and how significant was the drone attack?
- Ukraine’s largest drone attack engulfs Moscow in smoke
- Ukraine launches largest attack on Moscow since start of full-scale war
- Ukraine drone strike hits major Russian oil refinery near Moscow
- Ukraine hits Moscow with ‘large-scale’ attack
- Ukraine launches large drone attack on Moscow ahead of NATO meeting
- Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
- Video: Hundreds of drones target Russia in major Ukrainian attack
- Ukraine strikes Moscow oil refinery amid large-scale drone attack
- Ukraine Strikes Moscow Refinery in Large-Scale Drone Attack
- Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
- Ukrainian drone attack causes damage, injury in Moscow region
- Ukraine hits Moscow with largest-ever drone attack
- Russia Strikes Ukrainian Fuel Infrastructure Following Massive Drone Attack on Moscow
- Ukraine Strikes Moscow Oil Refinery in Drone Attack
- Ukraine Sets Major Oil Refinery Ablaze in Largest-Ever Drone Attack on Moscow
- Ukraine hits Moscow oil refinery in major drone attack on Russian capital
- Ukraine hits Moscow oil refinery, disrupting commercial flights in major drone attack
- Ukraine Strikes Moscow Refinery in Large-Scale Drone Attack
- Video: Hundreds of drones target Russia in major Ukrainian attack
- Ukrainian drones strike Moscow and region, hitting oil refinery in Kapotnya
- What is known about largest Ukrainian drone attack on Moscow Region in two years
- Attempted Ukrainian drone attack on Moscow becomes largest in two years
- Moscow targeted in massive Ukrainian drone raid
- Ukraine hits Moscow oil refinery, disrupting commercial flights in major drone attack
- Ukraine launches massive drone attack on Moscow]]>

- Vance Touts Iran Deal as Win for U.S. No Matter What Happens Next]]>
